keyEvents.text: Goal!  Curaçao 0, Panama 1. Yoel Bárcenas (Panama) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Cristian Martínez.
Cristian Martínez (Panama) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Kenji Gorré (Curaçao) is shown the yellow card.
Substitution, Panama. José Murillo replaces Cristian Martínez.
Substitution, Panama. José Luis Rodríguez replaces Alberto Quintero.
Substitution, Curaçao. Godfried Roemeratoe replaces Kevin Felida.
